items.question: Is Keepio really free?
items.answer: Yes. Download it, use it, love it — no strings attached. Projects, tasks, notes, iCloud sync, all free. Premium exists for power users who want to go even further.

items.question: Do I need to create an account?
items.answer: Nope. Zero account, zero sign-up, zero friction. Open the app and start working. Your data lives on your device and your private iCloud — we never see a single byte.

items.question: How does sync work?
items.answer: Keepio uses Apple's CloudKit — the same technology behind iCloud. Enable it once, and everything stays perfectly in sync across all your Apple devices. It just works.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Completely. No trackers, no analytics, no data collection. Your content is encrypted via iCloud and stored locally. We literally cannot access your data. Privacy isn't a feature — it's a principle.

items.question: Can I cancel Premium anytime?
items.answer: Of course. Cancel whenever you want from your App Store settings. No hoops, no guilt trips. Your premium features stay active until the end of your billing period.

items.question: What devices are supported?
items.answer: iPhone and iPad running iOS 26+. Your entire workflow, synced seamlessly across every Apple device you own.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using the Keepio app, you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before using the app.

sections.title: 1. App Access
sections.text: The app is available for download on the App Store for iOS devices. Basic features are free to use without creating an account.

sections.title: 2. Premium Subscription
sections.text: Keepio offers optional premium features through auto-renewable subscriptions:
list: Keepio Premium Monthly: Access to all premium features for one month
Keepio Premium Yearly: Access to all premium features for one year at a discounted rate
extraList: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase
Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period
You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your App Store account settings after purchase
Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.text: All content, source code, designs, and visuals in Keepio are the exclusive property of the developer. Any unauthorized reproduction, modification, or distribution is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Prohibited Use
list: Decompile, reverse engineer, or modify the app
Use the app for any illegal, harmful, or unauthorized purposes
Attempt to access another user's data or interfere with the app's functionality

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for:
list: Data loss due to iCloud synchronization issues or device failures
App malfunctions, interruptions, or temporary unavailability
Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app

sections.title: 6. Modifications
sections.text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 7. Applicable Law
sections.text: These terms are governed by French law. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in France.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.text: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at: contact@keepio.fr or use the contact form on our website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Keepio collects, uses, and protects your information.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: Keepio does not collect any personally identifiable information (name, email, etc.). The app only stores:
list: Content you create: projects, tasks, notes, and tags
Metadata: creation dates, progress status, and organizational settings

sections.title: 2. Data Storage
sections.text: Your data is stored locally on your device and, if enabled, synchronized via your private iCloud account using Apple's CloudKit technology. We do not have access to your iCloud data.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Services
sections.text: Keepio uses the following third-party services:
list: Apple CloudKit: For optional iCloud synchronization across your devices
Apple App Store: For processing premium subscription payments
sections.extra: We do not share your personal information with any other third parties.

sections.title: 4. Analytics
sections.text: Keepio does not use any third-party analytics or tracking services. We do not track your usage or behavior within the app.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.text: In compliance with GDPR and applicable privacy laws, you have the right to:
list: Access your data at any time within the app
Delete all your data directly from the app
Disable iCloud synchronization via your iOS Settings
Request information about your data by contacting us

sections.title: 6. Children's Privacy
sections.text: Keepio does not knowingly collect information from children under 13. The app is designed for general audiences.

sections.title: 7. Data Security
sections.text: We take reasonable measures to protect your data. All data synchronized via iCloud is encrypted using Apple's security protocols.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes through the app or our website.

sections.title: 9. Contact Us
sections.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: contact@keepio.fr
